case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. JOANNE MARIE FITZPATRICK

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2011 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT FITZPATRICK, JOANNE MARIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-10-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$45.94) SERVED SEP-24-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FITZPATRICK, JOANNE MARIE
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING W/PROOF OF SERVICE ATTACHED. FILED BY DEFENDANT FITZPATRICK, JOANNE MARIE
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT-
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-10-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-10-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FITZPATRICK, JOANNE MARIE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-10-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
